tree.name: Pascal Siakam
tree.tradeDescription: IND traded Bruce Brown, Kira Lewis Jr., Jordan Nwora, a 2024 1st round pick (Isaiah Collier, IND own), a 2024 1st round pick (Ja'Kobe Walter, least favorable conditional), and a 2026 1st round pick (IND own) to TOR for Pascal Siakam. TOR also received a trade exception. IND first acquired Kira Lewis Jr. and a 2024 2nd round pick from NOP for cash.

assetsGivenUp.name: Bruce Brown
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent from DEN in July 2023

assetsGivenUp.name: Jordan Nwora
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from MIL in 4-team KD trade. MIL sent Hill, Ibaka, Nwora, and 3 2nd round picks to IND.

assetsGivenUp.name: Kira Lewis Jr.
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from NOP for cash on same day as Siakam trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 1st Round Pick (least favorable conditional)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from OKC in 4-team trade (June 23, 2023). Conveyed as least favorable of OKC/LAC/HOU.
